name: DynaVap - Low Temp Captive Cap
summary: Discover a new level of enjoyment with the DynaVap - Low Temp Captive Cap.
description: Discover a new level of enjoyment with the DynaVap - Low Temp Captive Cap. This innovative Cap offers incredible flavour and a lower heating temperature, while effectively preserving your material. Its patented technology and distinctive logo guarantee that the Cap remains securely attached to your device, making it an essential addition for getting the most out of your DynaVap experience. *Compatible with all DynaVap devices A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
